brand.name: Blanxiro Studios
brand.tagline: You imagine it. We craft it. Your brand, fully fulfilled.
brand.description: Blanxiro Studios is a creator-first production collective where independent artists launch premium apparel with zero operational burden.

mission.title: Built for Creator Brands
mission.statement: Blanxiro Studios helps artists and micro-brands turn original ideas into physical products without building a full operations team. You focus on design and community; we handle sourcing, print production, packaging, and delivery with studio-grade quality control.

community.title: FROM CONCEPT TO CUSTOMER
community.subtitle: A clean workflow for design-led brands: upload, approve, sell, and ship globally.

timeline.title: Register & Design
timeline.description: Sign up with Blanxiro Studio and start designing your unique creations. Both emerging and established artists are welcome to showcase their talent in our community. Your creativity is the first step toward making your designs real.

timeline.alt: Providing customer details for an order
timeline.title: Place Your Order
timeline.description: Once your design is ready, place an order and provide us with the customer details. This ensures your creation reaches the right person while keeping your brand and design front and center.

timeline.title: We Ship Your Design
timeline.description: We produce, pack, and deliver your design with your name and artwork printed or embroidered on the clothing. Every order reflects your creativity, ready to impress and delight your customers.

testimonials.title: What creators say about Blanxiro Studios
testimonials.subtitle: Feedback from independent artists who scale faster with our production pipeline.

list.testimonial: Wadada changed my life. From struggling to run 5 minutes to completing my first marathon, this community believed in me when I didn't believe in myself.
I was intimidated to join a running group, but Wadada welcomed me with open arms. Now I have lifelong friends and the confidence to chase any goal.
The energy at Wadada runs is infectious. Whether you're fast or slow, everyone cheers you on. It's not about competition—it's about community.
After years of running alone, finding Wadada was a game-changer. The group runs pushed me to new personal bests I never thought possible.
Wadada taught me that running isn't just exercise—it's therapy, friendship, and adventure all rolled into one. This club saved my mental health.
From couch to 10K in 6 months with Wadada's support. They meet you where you are and help you discover where you can go. Pure magic.
The sunrise runs with Wadada are spiritual experiences. There's something powerful about moving together as the world wakes up around us.
I joined Wadada after moving to a new city. Not only did I find my running tribe, but I found my chosen family. Movement truly is lifestyle here.
Wadada celebrates every victory, no matter how small. My first mile felt like winning the Olympics with this crew cheering me on.
The training plans at Wadada are incredible. I went from barely finishing a 5K to qualifying for Boston in just two years.

join.title: BUILD YOUR MERCH LINE
join.subtitle: Get launch updates, studio insights, and creator resources.
join.ctaDescription: At Blanxiro Studios, your artwork becomes a sellable product line while we run the backend operations.

chatbot.title: Blanxiro AI Assistant
chatbot.welcomeMessage: Hi! I am the Blanxiro Studios assistant. Ask me about products, pricing, and order flow.
chatbot.placeholder: Ask about products, pricing, or shipping...

pricing.title: Transparent Studio Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Base catalog and print costs are synced from HEHO tables (products + printing_price).

garments.description: Synced from products table: product_name + use
